metadata.description: The Lens, Manual Focus's working library of AI marketing skills for endurance-sport brands. Companion to the playbooks at manual-focus.co.uk/lens.

plugins.name: the-lens
plugins.description: 25 AI marketing skills covering positioning, brand voice, naming, demand-gen, content systems, lifecycle, ops and personal-assistant workflows, plus a setup-the-lens onboarding skill that welcomes new users and recommends a starter playbook. Ask Claude to 'set up The Lens' after install.
